title: pilosella × spathulifolia
intro: Pilosella × spathulifolia, also known as the hybrid of Pilosella aurantiaca and Pilosella officinarum, is a rare plant species native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella × spathulifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, tinctures, and topical applications, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
